<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\BackupDestination; use Illuminate\Support\Collection; use Spatie\Backup\Config\Config; class BackupDestinationFactory { /** * @return Collection<int, BackupDestination> */ public static function createFromArray(Config $config): Collection { return collect($config->backup->destination->disks) ->map(fn (string $filesystemName) => BackupDestination::create($filesystemName, $config->backup->name)); } }
